title: Karuthavanlaam Galeejaam Lyrics Velaikaran (2017) Lyrics
stanzas:
Karuththavanlaam Galeejaam
kelappi vittaanga.
andha karuththa maaththu
goiyaala.

ye uzhaichchathellaam nammaalu
odhinga nikkaatha.
vaa va therikkavidu
goiyyaala
thakkaali ..

ye Karuththavanlaam Galeejaam
ye ulaichchathellaam nammaalu

ye indha nagaram ippothaan
maanagaram aachu.
idhu maara muzhu
kaaranamae naama annaachi.

ye thagarathattaala
thangi irundhaalum.
chennaiyoda annai
namma kuppam thaana.

Karuththavanlaam Galeejaam
kelappi vittaanga.
andha karuththa maaththu
goiyaala.

ye uzhaichchathellaam nammaalu
odhinga nikkaatha.
vaa va therikkavidu
goiyyaala
thakkaali ..

ye Karuththavanlaam Galeejaam
ye uzhaichchathellaam nammaalu

area kaasi kuppom
ellorum onnaa nippom
yaarunnu paakkamaattom
paasaththa pangu vaippom

tajmahala kattinadhu
koththanaaru
shahjahan kitta sonnaakooda
oththupaaru (2)

udhavinnu kaettaakooda
apartmentu aalu
nice-ah appeet aavaaru
phone-a switch off
seivaaru.

evanummae azhaikkaama
kuppam kopaalu
vandhu kooda nippaaru.
edhuthu vela paaappaaru.

oorukku sondhakkaaran
kaikatti veliya ninnaan.
paerukku chennaikkaaran
yedhedho sattam sonnaan.

ye Karuththavanlaam Galeejaam
ye Karuththavanlaam
ye uzhaichchathellaam

ye Karuththavanlaam Galeejaam
thakkaali ..

ye indha nagaram ippothaan
maanagaram aachu.
idhu maara muzhu
kaaranamae naama annaachi.

ye thagara koottukkulla
thangi irundhaalum.
chennaiyoda annai
namma kuppam thaana.

Karuththavanlaam Galeejaam
kelappi vittaanga.
andha karuththa maaththu
goiyaala.

ye uzhaichchathellaam nammaalu
odhinga nikkaatha.
vaa va therikkavidu
goiyyaala
thakkaali ..

nettukuththaa nikkuthappaa
shopping mall-u
adha nikka vachcha
komban enga
kuppam aalu.

tajmahala kattinadhu
koththanaaru
shahjahan kitta sonnaakooda
oththupaaru (2)

sarru burru car-u inga
oadum paaru
indha salaiyellaam
kanmuzhuchi pottadhu yaaru.

tajmahala kattinadhu
koththanaaru
shahjahan kitta sonnaakooda
oththupaaru

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Karuthavanlaam Galeejaam?

The song is an energetic and motivational anthem that encourages hard work and perseverance.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

Anirudh is both the singer and the music director of the song.

What is the context of the song in the movie Velaikaran?

The song reflects the protagonist's journey and determination to overcome challenges in the film.

Who wrote the lyrics for Karuthavanlaam Galeejaam?

The lyrics were penned by Viveka.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Velaikaran, Karuthavanlaam Galeejaam serves as a powerful anthem that captures the essence of hard work and resilience. Anirudh's dynamic composition and vocals, paired with Viveka's impactful lyrics, create an energetic atmosphere that motivates listeners. The song is a celebration of determination and the spirit of overcoming obstacles. It resonates with anyone who believes in the power of perseverance and the drive to succeed.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the pulse of the city with Karuthavanlaam Galeejaam from the movie Velaikaran. Anirudh's electrifying beats combined with Viveka's powerful lyrics make this track an anthem of energy and motivation. Dive into the vibrant world of Velaikaran and experience the rhythm that moves the masses.
stanzaMeanings: They made the dark-skinned people dirty. That dark skin is a disguise.
All the work we did, we won't stand aside. Come, let's show them.
Hey, the dark-skinned people are dirty. All the work we did is ours.
This city has just become a metropolis. We are the main reason for this change.
Even if we stay in a mess, our village is the mother of Chennai.
They made the dark-skinned people dirty. That dark skin is a disguise.
All the work we did, we won't stand aside. Come, let's show them.
Hey, the dark-skinned people are dirty. All the work we did is ours.
We'll share the money in the area, everyone will stand together. We won't see who is who, we'll share the love.
The one who built the Taj Mahal, even if you tell Shah Jahan, he will agree.
If you ask for help, the apartment people will act nice, but then switch off their phones.
Without anyone calling, Kuppam Gopal will come and stand. He'll take up the work.
The local guy stood outside with folded hands. The one from Chennai said something.
Hey, the dark-skinned people are dirty. Hey, the dark-skinned people, all the work we did.
Hey, the dark-skinned people are dirty, tomato...
This city has just become a metropolis. We are the main reason for this change.
Even if we stay in a mess, our village is the mother of Chennai.
They made the dark-skinned people dirty. That dark skin is a disguise.
All the work we did, we won't stand aside. Come, let's show them.
The shopping mall stands tall, but the one who made it stand is from our village.
The one who built the Taj Mahal, even if you tell Shah Jahan, he will agree.
Cars zoom here, see who made these roads.
The one who built the Taj Mahal, even if you tell Shah Jahan, he will agree.
